rag_rules: Use `annex agree { ... };` blocks to contain AGREE contracts.
Place component type contracts (assumptions, guarantees, constants) in component type annexes.
Place implementation-level bindings (assignments) in implementation annexes.
generic_rules: Relate visible outputs to visible inputs in guarantees.
Use case-provided thresholds and legal visible feature names in contracts.
Ensure AGREE type declarations use `int`, `real`, or `bool`.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use `assume "label": expression;` and `guarantee "label": expression;` for contracts.
Define constants with `const name : type = value;`
Define equations with `eq name : type = expression;`
anti_patterns: Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes.
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions unless exposed as ports or constants.
Avoid unresolved references to AADL properties (e.g., Compute_Execution_Time) within AGREE expressions.
irrelevant_topics: AADL structural extraction (component types, implementations, features, connections, properties, and owners)
